description_long: This is a modern black sedan with a streamlined body and four doors, designed for urban and suburban environments. The car features a glossy black exterior with tinted windows and a silver trim around the windows. The front grille is wide and horizontal, flanked by two rectangular headlights, and the front bumper is integrated smoothly into the body. The wheels are dark-colored with a multi-spoke design, and the side mirrors are compact and aerodynamic. The rear of the car has a subtle trunk with integrated taillights and a small antenna on the roof. The overall design suggests a focus on comfort, practicality, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A sleek black four-door sedan with tinted windows, silver trim, and a modern, streamlined design. Features include rectangular headlights, dark wheels, and a subtle rear trunk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and smooth hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, silver window trim, and dark wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the trunk, taillights, and rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and antenna.
attribute_headlight_design: dual rectangular headlights with a horizontal arrangement
